games.title: Bus Parking Out
games.description: Logic meets strategy! Operate 3 types of buses in 8 vibrant colors, each requiring careful planning. Enjoy a stunning 3D environment as you clear the way for the selected bus and collect passengers.
games.instructions: Tap or click a bus to select it, then clear the path by moving other buses out of the way so it can reach the exit.

games.title: Tank Stars
games.description: Action-packed 2D tank warfare where you find the perfect shooting angle and destroy your opponent's war machine. Battle online against players worldwide or go offline against the AI.
games.instructions: Adjust your angle and power, then fire. Choose your weapon wisely and destroy the enemy tank before it destroys you.

games.title: Fireboy and Watergirl 5: Elements
games.description: Explore the Elemental Temples in Fireboy and Watergirl 5! Solve challenging puzzles, collect all the diamonds, and beat the time across six temples — Fire, Forest, Ice, Light, Wind, and Crystal.
games.instructions: Player 1 controls Fireboy with arrow keys. Player 2 controls Watergirl with WASD. Work together to solve puzzles and reach the exit.

games.title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3
games.description: A free holiday match-3 game where you complete vibrant levels, create combinations of three or more, earn bonuses, and help the heroes decorate the festive town for Christmas.
games.instructions: Swap adjacent tiles to create rows or columns of 3 or more matching items. Complete the level goal before running out of moves.

games.title: Bubble Shooter Pro 4
games.description: The ultimate bubble-popping adventure! Introduces exciting new features: the explosive Bomb and Firebomb to pop multiple bubbles at once, Bonus Gifts, and collecting Stars to complete Missions.
games.instructions: Aim with your mouse and click to shoot bubbles. Match 3 or more of the same color to pop them. Use bombs to clear the board.

games.title: Ice Cream Inc.
games.description: Step into the shoes of a master ice cream artist! Your goal is to run the most popular ice cream shop in town — scoop, decorate, and serve delicious treats to satisfy every customer.
games.shortDescription: Run your own ice cream shop
games.instructions: Follow the on-screen prompts to scoop and serve ice cream to customers. Keep them happy and grow your shop!

games.title: Big Block Blast
games.description: Arrange triangles and blocks to construct 2×2 formations. Color matching rewards you with bonus points, and special stackable blocks add strategic depth. A satisfying block puzzle you won't put down.
games.instructions: Drag blocks onto the grid. Form 2×2 squares of matching colors to blast them and score points.

games.title: My Cake Shop: Bake & Serve
games.description: Run your own sweet bakery! Bake and stack colorful donuts, clean messy floors, and serve hungry customers. Expand across the world by unlocking new bakery locations and upgrading your machines.
games.shortDescription: Bake, serve, and run your dream bakery
games.thumbnailAlt: My Cake Shop bake and serve game
games.instructions: Tap to bake donuts and cakes, serve customers quickly, and use earnings to upgrade your bakery.

games.title: Yummy Tales 3
games.description: Join Oscar, the clever farm dog, in this fun and addictive Match-3 puzzle game! Match 3 or more fruits and veggies to feed your farm animals and reach level goals before you run out of moves.
games.instructions: Swap adjacent tiles to match 3 or more fruits and vegetables. Complete the level goal before running out of moves.

games.title: Backgammon Multiplayer
games.description: Enjoy this stylish version of the classic Backgammon board game. Play in 3 modes: multiplayer online, against the computer AI, or challenge a friend locally.
games.instructions: Roll the dice and move your checkers accordingly. Bear off all your pieces before your opponent to win.

games.title: Slope Extra
games.description: An endless ball-rolling game where you steer a continuously accelerating ball down steep neon slopes. Dodge obstacles, collect bonuses, and see how far you can go before falling off the edge.
games.instructions: Use left/right arrow keys or A/D to steer the ball. Avoid red obstacles and gaps. The ball speeds up over time!

games.title: Cyber Cars Punk Racing
games.description: Futuristic 3D cyberpunk racing with 16 supercars across 60 racetracks. Choose from Career, Free Ride, Hot Pursuit, and Battle Arena modes. Supports single-player and two-player on the same screen.
games.instructions: Use WASD or arrow keys to drive. Drift around corners, boost on straights, and beat your opponents to the finish line.

games.title: Drift Rush 3D
games.description: Select a supercar, customize it, and race across 20 different tracks with 20 gameplay modes — standard racing, slalom, traffic navigation, and coin collection. Earn stars to unlock new vehicles.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or WASD to accelerate, brake, and steer. Drift around corners to earn bonus points.

games.title: Nonogram
games.description: A classic picture logic puzzle where you color cells in a grid according to numbers at the sides to reveal a hidden picture. Simple rules, deeply satisfying when you crack each puzzle.
games.instructions: Click cells to fill them in. Use the numbers on each row and column as clues. Right-click to mark a cell as empty.

games.title: Stickman Gradient
games.description: An amazing stickman runner game where you dodge obstacles while sprinting through city streets. The pace keeps getting faster — how long can you survive?
games.instructions: Use arrow keys or tap to jump and slide over obstacles. Don't stop running!

games.title: Arena Angry Cars
games.description: Battle 8 opponents in a sky arena with bumper cars. Push your enemies out of the platform before they push you. Choose your car, upgrade your build, and dominate the arena.
games.instructions: Drive with arrow keys or WASD. Ram into opponents to push them off the edge. Stay in the arena to win!

games.title: Monster Truck Sky Racing
games.description: Race massive monster trucks on spectacular tracks in the sky! Choose from 10 trucks across 12 special racing areas. Earn money by completing races to unlock more vehicles.
games.shortDescription: Monster truck racing in the sky
games.instructions: Use arrow keys to accelerate and steer your monster truck. Win races to earn money and unlock new trucks.

games.title: Cats Arena
games.description: Take part in the merciless battle of space cats! Score 30 points to win. Collect money from each point to improve your appearance and buy pets. Fast-paced arena action with cats in space!
games.instructions: Use mouse or touch to control your cat. Ram into enemies and score 30 points to win the round.

games.title: Bob the Robber 2
games.description: Bob must sneak into buildings, avoid cameras, pick locks, knock out guards, and watch out for zombies to protect the city. This stealth platformer packs more puzzles and more action than ever before.
games.shortDescription: Stealth platformer — sneak past guards and cameras
games.instructions: Use arrow keys to move and climb. Press Space/Up to pick locks or knock out guards. Avoid camera beams and security lasers.

games.title: Bob the Robber 5: Temple Adventure
games.description: Bob ventures into an ancient temple to steal its legendary treasure. Knock out mummies, avoid the gaze of statue eyes, and solve ancient traps in this exciting stealth platformer sequel.
games.shortDescription: Temple stealth adventure — rob ancient treasure
games.instructions: Move with arrow keys. Sneak past mummies and security statues. Pick locks and collect all treasure to complete each level.

games.title: 3 Pandas
games.description: Help three adorable pandas navigate a dangerous jungle! Each panda has a unique ability — use them together to get past hazards, solve puzzles, and make it home safely.
games.shortDescription: Solve jungle puzzles with three pandas
games.instructions: Click each panda to use their special ability. Work together to clear obstacles and guide all three pandas to the exit.

games.title: Square Bird
games.description: Build a tower of eggs and hop past barriers with perfect timing. Land exactly three times in a row to trigger Square Bird Fever — an explosive mode that blasts obstacles out of your way!
games.shortDescription: Stack eggs and hop past obstacles
games.instructions: Hold to lay eggs and build your tower, release to jump. Hit gaps precisely and land 3 times perfectly to trigger Fever mode.

games.title: Tomb Runner
games.description: Sprint, jump, slide, and surf through temples, bridges, and subways in this classic endless runner. Collect gems to unlock powerful speed boosts and shields as you race to beat your high score.
games.instructions: Swipe or use arrow keys to turn, jump, and slide. Collect gems and power-ups. Avoid obstacles and don't fall!

games.title: Ragdoll Swing
games.description: Swing your ragdoll hero through spike-filled levels using timed rope mechanics. Release at the perfect moment to fly through gaps and reach the finish line across 40+ challenging stages.
games.instructions: Click or tap to grab a rope and swing. Release at the right moment to launch toward the next anchor. Don't touch the spikes!

games.title: Filled Glass
games.description: Fill a glass with colorful balls to exactly the marked level — not a single ball too many or too few. Physics-based precision puzzles get trickier with every level. Simple to learn, tough to master.
games.shortDescription: Physics puzzle — fill the glass just right
games.instructions: Click or tap to drop balls into the glass. Fill it to the marked line exactly — too many or too few and you'll have to retry!

games.title: Pool 8
games.description: A satisfying billiards puzzle game where you plan every shot in advance. Line up your cue, choose the right order, and sink all balls in a single calculated run. Perfect for strategy lovers.
games.shortDescription: Strategic billiards puzzle — plan every shot
games.instructions: Aim with your mouse, adjust power, and shoot. Plan your shots carefully to sink all balls in the right order.
